raw_text:
HEADER
MOHAMED AZIZ BELAWEID
+4917668727956 ⋄ Berlin, Germany
[azizbelaweid@gmail.com](mailto:azizbelaweid@gmail.com) ⋄ [linkedin.com/in/mohamed-aziz-belaweid/](lhttps://www.linkedin.com/in/mohamed-aziz-belaweid/) ⋄ [github.com/azayz](https://github.com/azayz)
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Machine Learning Engineer July 2023 - Present
July 2023 - Present
SoundCloud *Berlin, Germany*
- Created track features and pipelines using **BigQuery and Airflow** that resulting in an **increase of 10 min of listening time for 3M users.**
- Created tool that allowed music teams to curate playlists and **select tracks from 300 million** using **SQL** and Looker.
Machine Learning Engineer May 2021 - June 2023
May 2021 - June 2023
JinaAI *Berlin, Germany*
- Finetune LLMs on coding data, using **LoRA and 8 bit Quantization** techniques on 3 3090 GPUs.
- Created Data for finetuning LLMs **using self-instruct, LIMA and self chat papers.**
- Developed a **multimodal search system using CLIP’s semantic representation for image and text** , replacing keyword-based search and eliminating tedious labelling for **100k+ gifs** .
- Developed an information retrieval pipeline that parses technical documentation and created embeddings using
**Dense Passage Retrieval and Tf Idf** , Eliminating **60% of support workload** .
- Implemented a callback wrapper for **PyTorch, TensorFlow, and PaddlePaddle** , making the finetuner API easier to use for **250 monthly developers.**
https://github.com/jina-ai/finetuner/pull/249  ,  https://github.com/jina-ai/finetuner/pull/266
Data Scientist Jan. 2021 – Oct. 2021
Jan. 2021 – Oct. 2021
RelationalAI *Berkeley, CA US*
- Pretrained **BERT from scratch** using **Nvidea NeMo and Pytorch Lightning on 4 V100 GPUs for MLM and NSP tasks** . Trained on 12GB of legal data, monitored using Tensorboard. Resulting in a better- performing named entity recognition model than legal BERT after finetuning with an average **94% F1 score for entities** .
- Worked with a team of lawyers to annotate and clean data for named entity recognition using Prodigy labeling tool. Trained **SpaCy NER models (CNN sliding window) and BiLSTM-CRF** to label more data and conducted error analysis and data enhancement. Resulted in a **4x speed up in data labeling and improved quality** .
Paper: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/10020873
Artificial Intelligence R&D Intern July. 2020 – Sep. 2020 Vneuron *Tunis, TUN*
July. 2020 – Sep. 2020
- Automated customer review analysis in English, French, Arabic, and Tunisian dialect, accelerating the process **from 1 week to 2 days** and improving customer support experience by finetuning a **Multilingual Distil- BERT model** for the Tunisian/Arabic dialect for sentiment classification with TensorFlow (98% accuracy).
- Improved model performance by **6%** by **scraping customer reviews from Google Maps using Selenium and BeautifulSoup** , providing more accurate customer satisfaction results.
- Deployed a Flask app to showcase the model’s performance and test manual examples, resulting in faster experimentation and debugging.
COMPUTER VISION & NATURAL LANGUAGE PROCESSING (NLP)
Datavision *Tunis, TUN*
- Developed a mask detection model using **EfficientDet and Yolo-v4** , calculating the percentage of masked vs unmasked people in public places and restaurants/coffees, enforcing COVID regulations for business owners.
- Developed an age and gender classification model **92% accuracy** by fine-tuning the **EfficientNet** architecture using AWS EC2 instances and S3 storage, helping business owners understand the customer demographic and finetune product placement quality resulting in **15% profit increase** .
- Optimized inference time by **20%** using **TensorRT** and deployed the model using **Docker** and **TensorFlow Serving** , making predictions faster with a lighter model.
ACADEMIC PROJECTS
Top 1% (5/1317) in the Plant Pathology Research Competition on Kaggle This competition is part of Fine- Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC) workshop at CVPR 2020. My personal result: 0.9806 AUC. Used multiple data augmentation methods such as **CutMix, CutOut and GridMask** . [(Solution Notebook here.)](https://www.kaggle.com/aziz69/efficientnetb7-tpu-tta-top-1)
2020
**Certified Tensorflow Developper** [Passed TensforFlow certification exam.](https://www.credential.net/2a730008-672d-4a78-9c82-0cc75e3d106d#gs.wd4vza)
**Blog to Summarize and Discuss Research Papers** Actively write [blog posts](https://azizbelaweid.medium.com/) viewed by over **22K+** data scientists and engineers, **summarizing most recent research papers.**
EDUCATION
Master of Software Engineering , National Institute of Applied Sciences and Technology (INSAT) Sep. 2017 – June. 2022
Sep. 2017 – June. 2022
Relevant Coursework: OOP, Design Patterns, Parallel Computing, Software Architecture, Databases, Calculus, Linear Algebra, Probability and Statistics, Data Structures and Algorithms.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming Languages Python, Java, C++, SQL
Frameworks Pytorch, Jax, Flask, FastAPI, Pytest, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Huggingface
Tools Git, Linux, Weights and Biases, Docker
markdown:
# MOHAMED AZIZ BELAWEID

+4917668727956 ⋄ Berlin, Germany

[azizbelaweid@gmail.com](mailto:azizbelaweid@gmail.com) ⋄ [linkedin.com/in/mohamed-aziz-belaweid/](lhttps://www.linkedin.com/in/mohamed-aziz-belaweid/) ⋄ [github.com/azayz](https://github.com/azayz)

### EXPERIENCE

**Machine Learning Engineer** July 2023 - Present

SoundCloud *Berlin, Germany*

- Created track features and pipelines using **BigQuery and Airflow** that resulting in an **increase of 10 min of listening time for 3M users.**
- Created tool that allowed music teams to curate playlists and **select tracks from 300 million** using **SQL** and Looker.

**Machine Learning Engineer** May 2021 - June 2023

JinaAI *Berlin, Germany*

- Finetune LLMs on coding data, using **LoRA and 8 bit Quantization** techniques on 3 3090 GPUs.
- Created Data for finetuning LLMs **using self-instruct, LIMA and self chat papers.**
- Developed a **multimodal search system using CLIP’s semantic representation for image and text** , replacing keyword-based search and eliminating tedious labelling for **100k+ gifs** .
- Developed an information retrieval pipeline that parses technical documentation and created embeddings using

**Dense Passage Retrieval and Tf Idf** , Eliminating **60% of support workload** .

- Implemented a callback wrapper for **PyTorch, TensorFlow, and PaddlePaddle** , making the finetuner API easier to use for **250 monthly developers.**

https://github.com/jina-ai/finetuner/pull/249  ,  https://github.com/jina-ai/finetuner/pull/266

**Data Scientist** Jan. 2021 – Oct. 2021

RelationalAI *Berkeley, CA US*

- Pretrained **BERT from scratch** using **Nvidea NeMo and Pytorch Lightning on 4 V100 GPUs for MLM and NSP tasks** . Trained on 12GB of legal data, monitored using Tensorboard. Resulting in a better- performing named entity recognition model than legal BERT after finetuning with an average **94% F1 score for entities** .
- Worked with a team of lawyers to annotate and clean data for named entity recognition using Prodigy labeling tool. Trained **SpaCy NER models (CNN sliding window) and BiLSTM-CRF** to label more data and conducted error analysis and data enhancement. Resulted in a **4x speed up in data labeling and improved quality** .

### Paper: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/10020873

**Artificial Intelligence R&D Intern** July. 2020 – Sep. 2020 Vneuron *Tunis, TUN*

- Automated customer review analysis in English, French, Arabic, and Tunisian dialect, accelerating the process **from 1 week to 2 days** and improving customer support experience by finetuning a **Multilingual Distil- BERT model** for the Tunisian/Arabic dialect for sentiment classification with TensorFlow (98% accuracy).
- Improved model performance by **6%** by **scraping customer reviews from Google Maps using Selenium and BeautifulSoup** , providing more accurate customer satisfaction results.
- Deployed a Flask app to showcase the model’s performance and test manual examples, resulting in faster experimentation and debugging.

### GitHub Repository: https://github.com/azayz/Tunisian-Arabic-Dialect-Sentiment-Analysis Computer Vision Intern	May. 2020 – July. 2020

Datavision *Tunis, TUN*

- Developed a mask detection model using **EfficientDet and Yolo-v4** , calculating the percentage of masked vs unmasked people in public places and restaurants/coffees, enforcing COVID regulations for business owners.
- Developed an age and gender classification model **92% accuracy** by fine-tuning the **EfficientNet** architecture using AWS EC2 instances and S3 storage, helping business owners understand the customer demographic and finetune product placement quality resulting in **15% profit increase** .
- Optimized inference time by **20%** using **TensorRT** and deployed the model using **Docker** and **TensorFlow Serving** , making predictions faster with a lighter model.

### PROJECTS AND AWARDS

**Top 1% (5/1317) in the Plant Pathology Research Competition on Kaggle** This competition is part of Fine- Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC) workshop at CVPR 2020. My personal result: 0.9806 AUC. Used multiple data augmentation methods such as **CutMix, CutOut and GridMask** . [(Solution Notebook here.)](https://www.kaggle.com/aziz69/efficientnetb7-tpu-tta-top-1)

**Certified Tensorflow Developper** [Passed TensforFlow certification exam.](https://www.credential.net/2a730008-672d-4a78-9c82-0cc75e3d106d#gs.wd4vza)

**Blog to Summarize and Discuss Research Papers** Actively write [blog posts](https://azizbelaweid.medium.com/) viewed by over **22K+** data scientists and engineers, **summarizing most recent research papers.**

### EDUCATION

**Master of Software Engineering** , National Institute of Applied Sciences and Technology (INSAT) Sep. 2017 – June. 2022

Relevant Coursework: OOP, Design Patterns, Parallel Computing, Software Architecture, Databases, Calculus, Linear Algebra, Probability and Statistics, Data Structures and Algorithms.

### SKILLS

**Programming Languages** Python, Java, C++, SQL

**Frameworks** Pytorch, Jax, Flask, FastAPI, Pytest, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Huggingface

**Tools** Git, Linux, Weights and Biases, Docker
